name: Won't start
description: Engine cranks but does not fire or run

name: No crank
description: Starter motor does not engage when start button pressed

name: Slow crank
description: Engine turns over slowly, may not start

name: Clicks but won't crank
description: Starter solenoid clicks but starter motor doesn't turn

name: Hard to start when cold
description: Requires extended cranking or multiple attempts when engine is cold

name: Hard to start when hot
description: Difficulty starting after engine has been running and is at operating temp

name: Stalls at idle
description: Engine dies when at idle speed, may restart fine

name: Rough idle
description: Engine runs unevenly at idle, may shake or vibrate

name: High idle
description: Engine idles faster than normal, won't settle down

name: Idle surges
description: Engine RPM rises and falls repeatedly at idle

name: Loss of power
description: Engine lacks normal acceleration or top-end power

name: Misfires
description: Engine skips or pops under load, may have rough running

name: Backfires
description: Popping sound from intake or exhaust, may be on decel or accel

name: Engine knock or ping
description: Metallic tapping or pinging sound from engine under load

name: Overheating
description: Engine temperature rises above normal, may trigger warning light

name: Coolant leak
description: Visible coolant loss or puddle under bike

name: Oil leak
description: Visible oil dripping or accumulation on engine or ground

name: Excessive oil consumption
description: Oil level drops between service intervals without visible leaks

name: White smoke from exhaust
description: White or grey smoke from exhaust pipe, may smell sweet

name: Black smoke from exhaust
description: Dark black smoke from exhaust, rich fuel smell

name: Battery not charging
description: Battery voltage drops while riding, may die on the road

name: Battery drains overnight
description: Battery goes dead when bike sits for a day or more

name: Headlight dim or flickering
description: Headlight brightness fluctuates or is consistently dim

name: Check engine light on
description: MIL / check engine indicator illuminated on dash

name: Fuel leak
description: Gasoline smell or visible drip from fuel system

name: Poor fuel economy
description: Getting fewer miles per gallon than normal

name: Spongy brakes
description: Brake lever or pedal feels soft, requires more travel to stop

name: Brake squeal
description: High-pitched squealing noise when applying brakes

name: ABS light on
description: Anti-lock braking system warning light illuminated

name: Clutch slipping
description: Engine RPM rises but speed doesn't increase proportionally

name: Hard shifting
description: Difficulty moving shift lever between gears

name: Chain noise
description: Excessive chain rattle, slapping, or grinding sound

name: Vibration at speed
description: Unusual vibration felt through handlebars, pegs, or seat at certain speeds

name: Front end wobble
description: Handlebars oscillate side-to-side, especially at certain speeds

name: Suspension bottoming out
description: Suspension uses full travel too easily, harsh over bumps

name: Ticking or tapping from engine
description: Rhythmic metallic ticking sound from engine, may vary with RPM

name: Grinding noise from transmission
description: Metal grinding sound when shifting or in a specific gear

name: Whining noise at speed
description: High-pitched whine that changes with vehicle speed, not engine RPM

name: Exhaust leak sound
description: Ticking or hissing from exhaust, louder when cold

name: Burning smell
description: Smell of something burning while riding — may be oil, electrical, or clutch
